title: lycianthes uncinella
intro: Lycianthes uncinella, also known as the purple passion or passion flower, is a flowering plant species in the Solanaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lycianthes uncinella include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting sleep, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in some commercial products, such as supplements and skincare products.
